series_metadata.series_description: Records document requests from county Child Support Enforcement Agency(CSEA’s) to recover funds that were incorrectly disbursed or misapplied in error. Files include, but are not limited to, Recoupment Account Maintenance From, Recoupment Account Creation/Modification or Deletion Request Form, Recoupment Account forms are housed within the "FC_MC_Requests"(name of e-mail account), Recoupment Requests are tracked within the Recoupment Account Access Database.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office or no longer administrative or Fiscal value ; Electronic: in office or no longer administrative or Fiscal value
